hero.heading: Purpose-built software that ships

features.title: Ship faster with confidence
features.description: We align strategy, execution, and measurement across the entire product lifecycle.

items.name: Unified delivery platform

items.name: Adaptive workflows
items.description: Automate governance while giving teams the autonomy to experiment responsibly.

items.name: Insightful analytics
items.description: Track value shipped with real-time dashboards and predictive forecasting.

items.name: Enterprise-grade trust
items.description: Rely on zero-trust architecture, audit trails, and compliance ready out of the box.

items.quote: Acme keeps our roadmap connected to outcomes. Shipping feels predictable again.
items.author: Lena Ortiz

items.quote: The automation saves my team hours every week and gives execs the visibility they expect.

items.quote: Security reviews used to take weeks. With Acme they are part of the workflow by default.

cta.title: Ready to accelerate your roadmap?
cta.description: Partner with Acme to launch strategic initiatives on schedule without burning out your teams.

pricing.title: Predictable pricing for every growth stage
pricing.subtitle: Annual commitments include onboarding, enablement, and success coaching.

plans.name: Launch
plans.description: For startups standardizing delivery across squads.

plans.name: Scale
plans.description: For high-growth teams orchestrating complex portfolios.

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.description: For global enterprises needing bespoke workflows and controls.

faq.question: How long does onboarding take?
faq.answer: Teams typically launch within 14 days with guided configuration and training.

faq.question: Do you support hybrid delivery models?
faq.answer: Yes. Acme connects agile, waterfall, and OKR cadences with shared governance.

faq.question: Is there a minimum contract size?
faq.answer: Launch starts at 10 seats. Scale and Enterprise are customized to your operating model.

faq.question: Can we migrate historical data?
faq.answer: Our migration team assists with importing issues, artifacts, and runbooks securely.

contact.title: Let’s build your next release
contact.subtitle: Share a bit about your team and goals. We’ll follow up within one business day.
contact.success: Thanks for reaching out — our team will connect shortly.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email support@acme.com.
